input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.8.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.8.4
            TITLE: requirements for all fasteners

            CONTENT:
            rule T.8.4: Requirements for All Fasteners
T.8.4 Requirements for All Fasteners 
Adjustable tie rod ends must be constrained with a jam nut to prevent loosening.

final_answer: Adjustable tie rod ends must be constrained with a jam nut to prevent loosening.
